coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加1层[PenetrateTakeDamageUp] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加1层嫉妒[Vulnerable]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[PenetrateTakeDamageUp] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加1层嫉妒[Vulnerable] 
[OnSucceedAttackHead] 对目标施加3层[Curse]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[PenetrateTakeDamageUp] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加1层嫉妒[Vulnerable] 
[OnSucceedAttackHead] 对目标施加3层[Curse] 
[OnSucceedAttackHead] 对目标施加3层[NailPersonality] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 若目标带有[Curse] ，则使本硬币造成的伤害+50%

2020311.name: 好痛！
2020311.desc: 自身每带有1种负面状态，使自身造成的伤害+10%。(最多+50%)
